CustomField.formula: CASE( LEFT(spartext__c , 2), '10', 'Multi-media', '11', 'DEL-Multi Media-CRT', '12', 'DEL-Multi Media-LCD', '13', 'DEL-Multi Media-PDP', '14', 'Multi-media-LED', '15', 'Multi-media-BlueT', '16', 'Multi-media-ITV', '17', 'Multi-media-Laser', '18', 'Multi-media-DVD', '19', 'B-Monitor', '20', 'DEL- Media-Communic', '21', 'Multi-media-Mobile P', '22', 'DEL- Media-Bluetoot', '30', 'point of sale', '31', 'Multi-media-Soundar', '32', 'Multi-media-Medical', '33', 'Multi-media-MONITOR', '34', 'Medical.Ultrasound', '35', 'Medical.Monitor', '36', 'Smart City', '49', 'Multi-media-OTS', '50', 'Multi-media-SP', '5Z', 'Multi-media-SP', '60', 'Appliances', '61', 'Appliances-ACH', '62', 'Appliances-REF', '63', 'Appliances-CF', '64', 'Appliances-WM', '65', 'Appliances-SHA', '66', 'Appliances-HisenseAC', '67', 'Appliances-HitachiAC', '68', 'Appliances-ClothesDr', '69', 'Appliances-WineCabi', '6A', 'Appliances-KitchenCH', '6B', 'Appliances-Dishwash', '6C', 'Appliances-CommerCF', '89', 'Appliances-OTS', '90', 'Appliances-SP', '9Z', 'Appliances-PrdLine', 'A1', 'Consumer ', '')
CustomField.label: Product Line
